tasks.label: Copy Integration to custom_components
tasks.command: sudo rm -rf /mnt/supervisor/homeassistant/custom_components/poollab && sudo mkdir -p /mnt/supervisor/homeassistant/custom_components/poollab && sudo cp -r /addons/Poollab/custom_components/poollab/* /mnt/supervisor/homeassistant/custom_components/poollab/ && echo 'Copied integration to /mnt/supervisor/homeassistant/custom_components/poollab'

tasks.label: Restart HA Core
tasks.command: ha core restart && echo 'HA Core Restarted'

tasks.label: Start Home Assistant
tasks.command: command -v supervisor_run >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'Not inside Home Assistant dev container. Reopen in container first.'; exit 1; }; for f in /usr/bin/supervisor*(N); do sudo chmod a+x "$f"; done; sudo -E supervisor_run
